task_completion.description: Log in to NOSH ChartingSystem using administrator credentials.

task_completion.description: Locate the record for patient Robert Schiller.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient 'Robert Schiller' (DOB: 1965-09-14) is visible in the active patient context, patient summary, or search results.

task_completion.description: Open a chart note or encounter for the patient.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A charting, encounter, or clinical notes interface is open specifically for Robert Schiller.

task_completion.description: Document the transfer of care in the chart note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The exact text 'Patient transferred care to out-of-state provider effective 2025-01-15' is typed into the chart note's text area or saved in the patient's notes.

task_completion.description: Change the patient's status to Inactive/Deactivated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient's demographic or administrative settings show the status dropdown or toggle set to 'Inactive', 'Deactivated', or the system's equivalent.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH web interface rather than using terminal commands or database scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the NOSH ChartingSystem UI, not a terminal window executing SQL or curl commands.

integrity.description: The agent entered the note and status change into the actual EHR application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text and status changes are visible within the specific input fields, text areas, and dropdowns of the NOSH web application, not in a generic text editor or notepad.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock the interface using a local HTML file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL bar shows a network address (e.g., localhost, 127.0.0.1, or an IP address) rather than a local file path (file://).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target application is NOSH ChartingSystem. The agent must log in using username 'admin' and password 'Admin1234!'. The target patient is Robert Schiller, DOB: 1965-09-14.
